name: African Vegetarian Stew
recipeIngredient: 4 small Kohlrabies, peeled and cut into chunks (chick-peas)
2 sweet potatoes, peeled and cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer until vegetables are tender (about 30 minutes).
3. Note: Serve couscous separately if desired; parsnips may substitute for kohlrabi.
4. One serving = Calories: 241 | Carbohydrates: 42 | Protein: 8 | Fat: 2 | Sodium: 22 | Potassium: 658 | Cholesterol: 0
Exchange Value: 2 Bread Exchanges + 2 Vegetable Exchanges
